name: axon
description: Spider-powered self-hosted RAG engine — scrape, map, extract, crawl, embed, and query via MCP or CLI. 16 skills covering web crawling, GitHub/Reddit/YouTube ingest, semantic vector search, and grounded LLM answers over indexed content.

qdrant_url.title: Qdrant URL
qdrant_url.description: URL of your Qdrant vector store (e.g. http://localhost:53333)

tei_url.title: TEI embedding server URL
tei_url.description: URL of your Text Embeddings Inference server (e.g. http://localhost:52000)

collection.title: Qdrant collection name
collection.description: Collection to read and write vectors (default: cortex)

openai_base_url.title: LLM base URL
openai_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint URL (used for ask, research, extract)

openai_api_key.title: LLM API key
openai_api_key.description: API key for the LLM endpoint

openai_model.title: LLM model name
openai_model.description: Model identifier passed to the LLM endpoint

tavily_api_key.title: Tavily API key
tavily_api_key.description: API key for Tavily web search (required for search/research commands)

chrome_remote_url.title: Chrome remote URL
chrome_remote_url.description: Headless Chrome management API URL (e.g. http://localhost:6000)
